title: Update GitHub Repository Variable ALLOWED_PATHS for Auto-Merge Support
job:
Update the GitHub repository variable ALLOWED_PATHS to expand auto-merge support.

Use the GitHub CLI to set the repository variable ALLOWED_PATHS to:
/logs,/skills,/config,/cron,/triggers,/data,/docs

Steps:
1. Ensure GH_TOKEN, GH_OWNER, and GH_REPO environment variables are available
2. Run: gh variable set ALLOWED_PATHS --body "/logs,/skills,/config,/cron,/triggers,/data,/docs"
3. Verify the variable was set correctly by running: gh variable view ALLOWED_PATHS
4. Output the confirmation to console

This will enable auto-merge for job PRs that modify these directories.
